name: components/button
description: The primary interactive element for triggering actions. Provides six visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four size options (sm, default, lg, icon/icon-sm/icon-lg). Built on Kobalte Button with automatic focus-visible rings, disabled state styling, aria-invalid support, and consistent SVG icon sizing via the cva variant system.
useCases: Primary form submission, save, cancel, and next-step actions
Destructive variant for dangerous actions such as delete, remove, or permanent data erasure
Icon variants (icon, icon-sm, icon-lg) for compact toolbar buttons and header actions
Ghost and link variants for low-emphasis actions inside dropdowns, tables, or inline text
